---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a focused improvement to the relay, web app, CLI, protocol, or docs
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement you want.

## Problem

What limitation, pain point, or missing capability does this address?

## Proposed approach

Describe the solution you have in mind.

## Alternatives considered

List other approaches you considered, if any.

## Scope

Which area does this touch?

- relay
- web
- CLI
- protocol / blob format
- documentation
- deployment / ops

## Additional context

Add any examples, references, or constraints here.
